metadata.title: Click Image to Zoom
metadata.description: Click Image to Zoom Localization & Tweaks

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Toggle click-to-zoom on or off globally.
ast.target: 全局开启或关闭点击缩放功能。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: How much to zoom per scroll tick or keypress (default 0.2).
ast.target: 每次滚动或按键时的缩放量（默认 0.2）。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.target: 最大缩放级别（默认 5 倍）。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.target: 最小缩放级别（默认 0.5 倍）。

ast.name: setName
ast.target: 关于

ast.name: setName
ast.target: 使用方法

ast.name: setName
ast.target: 单笔记控制

ast.name: setName
ast.target: 配置

ast.name: setName
ast.target: 启用图片缩放

ast.name: setName
ast.target: 缩放步长

ast.name: setName
ast.target: 最大缩放

ast.name: setName
ast.target: 最小缩放

ast.name: name
ast.target: 切换图片缩放

ast.name: text
ast.source: Click any image in your notes to open it in a full-size zoomable modal. Supports scroll-to-zoom, drag-to-pan, pinch-to-zoom on mobile, and keyboard shortcuts.
ast.target: 点击笔记中的任意图片，即可在可缩放的全尺寸模态框中打开。支持滚轮缩放、拖拽平移、移动端捏合缩放以及键盘快捷键。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Click any image in a note to open the zoom modal
ast.target: 点击笔记中的任意图片以打开缩放模态框

ast.name: text
ast.source: Scroll to zoom in and out
ast.target: 滚动滚轮以放大和缩小

ast.name: text
ast.source: Click and drag to pan around the image
ast.target: 点击并拖拽以平移图片

ast.name: text
ast.source: Pinch to zoom on mobile devices
ast.target: 在移动设备上捏合以缩放

ast.name: text
ast.source: Press + or - to zoom, 0 to reset, escape to close
ast.target: 按 + 或 - 键缩放，按 0 键重置，按 Escape 键关闭

ast.name: text
ast.source: Click outside the image or the X button to close
ast.target: 点击图片外部或 X 按钮以关闭

ast.name: text
ast.source: You can disable image zoom for a specific note by adding the following frontmatter:
ast.target: 您可以通过添加以下 frontmatter 来为特定笔记禁用图片缩放：
